info.title: Divinci Public/Customer API
info.description: Public API for managing whitelabels, RAG knowledge bases, releases, fine-tuning, transcripts, and more. This spec is auto-generated from the Express route definitions in workspace/servers/public-api/src/api/v1 — every path and method is guaranteed to match the shipped server.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key with format `dv_key_...`. Permissions are attached to each key.

BearerAuth.description: Auth0 JWT token for workspace CRUD operations.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required or API key invalid

RateLimitExceeded.description: Rate limit exceeded for this API key + feature

post.summary: POST /api/v1/auth/validate-key Validates an API key and returns user context Protected by IP rate limiting + account lockout to prevent brute-force attacks
CopilotKit runtime endpoint - handles streaming AI responses

get.summary: Health check for copilot runtime - includes API key status

post.summary: Create or get transcript for a session POST /api/v1/divinci-agent/transcript
Sync messages to MongoDB POST /api/v1/divinci-agent/transcript/:transcriptId/sync

get.summary: Get messages for session restoration GET /api/v1/divinci-agent/transcript/:transcriptId/messages

post.summary: POST /api/v1/transcripts — Create transcript
POST /api/v1/transcripts/:transcriptId/messages — Add message
POST /api/v1/rag/files — Upload a new file for RAG indexing
POST /api/v1/rag/presigned — Get presigned R2 upload URLs Body: array of { byteSize: number, filename: string } Returns: array of presigned results with upload URLs
POST /api/v1/rag/files/audio — Upload audio from URL for transcription + RAG indexing Must be before /files/:fileId to avoid "audio" matching as a fileId
POST /api/v1/rag/files/audio-from-presigned — Finalize presigned audio upload

patch.summary: PATCH /api/v1/rag/files/:fileId — Update file properties (rawFileKey, status, title, etc.)

get.summary: GET /api/v1/rag/files/:fileId/chunks — List paginated chunks for a file Query params: offset (default 0), limit (default 25, max 100)

post.summary: POST /api/v1/rag/files/:fileId/reindex — Re-index a single file

get.summary: GET /api/v1/rag/targets — List RAG vector indexes (upload targets)

post.summary: POST /api/v1/rag/targets — Create a new RAG vector index Body: { title, vectorIndexTool, embeddingModel?, chunkingTool?, contextPerMessage?, minimumSimilarity?, ... }

patch.summary: PATCH /api/v1/rag/targets/:collectionId — Update retrieval settings (minimumSimilarity, contextPerMessage, embeddingModel)

delete.summary: DELETE /api/v1/rag/targets/:collectionId — Delete a RAG vector index and all its resources

post.summary: POST /api/v1/rag/targets/:collectionId/migrate — Clone index with new config + bulk reindex all files Body: { embeddingModel?, chunkingTool?, title?, contextPerMessage?, minimumSimilarity?, ... }
POST /api/v1/rag/targets/:collectionId/bulk-reindex — Re-queue all files in this index Body: { chunkingTool?, fileIds? }
POST /api/v1/rag/targets/:collectionId/prune-ghost-refs — Remove ghost file refs

get.summary: GET /api/v1/rag/search — Search knowledge base using D1 full-text search Query params: q (required), limit/topK (default 10, max 100), fileId (optional filter), collectionId (optional filter)

post.summary: POST /api/v1/rag/context — Semantic vector similarity retrieval Body: { query, collectionId | groupId, topK? }
POST /api/v1/rag/groups — Create a new group

patch.summary: PATCH /api/v1/rag/groups/:groupId — Update group (name, vectors, settings) Supports addVectorIds / removeVectorIds for incremental changes

post.summary: POST /api/v1/releases — Create a new release draft
POST /api/v1/releases/:releaseId/publish — Publish a release draft

get.summary: --- Custom AI Models --- GET /api/v1/fine-tune/jobs — List custom AI models

post.summary: POST /api/v1/fine-tune/jobs — Create a new custom AI model

get.summary: GET /api/v1/fine-tune/jobs/:jobId — Get a custom AI model

delete.summary: DELETE /api/v1/fine-tune/jobs/:jobId — Delete a custom AI model

post.summary: --- Fine-Tune Operations --- POST /api/v1/fine-tune/jobs/:jobId/start — Start fine-tuning
POST /api/v1/fine-tune/jobs/:jobId/cancel — Cancel fine-tuning
POST /api/v1/audio-transcripts/url — Upload audio from URL
POST /api/v1/audio-transcripts/:audioId/generate-rag — Generate RAG from completed transcript

get.summary: GET /api/v1/connectors/:provider — Get connection status for a specific provider

post.summary: POST /api/v1/connectors/:provider/auth — Initiate OAuth or validate credentials
POST /api/v1/connectors/:provider/disconnect — Revoke connection

get.summary: GET /api/v1/html-pages/hosts/history — List crawl history for all hosts
GET /api/v1/html-pages/hosts/:urlHost/history — Get crawl history for a specific host
GET /api/v1/notifications — List notifications Supports query params: page, limit, isRead, tags, notificationType, title, createdAfter, createdBefore
GET /api/v1/threads — List all threads for the whitelabel
GET /api/v1/threads/:chatId — Get a specific thread with transcript
GET /api/v1/voiceprints — List voiceprints for the whitelabel
GET /api/v1/export — Export whitelabel configuration (JSON or YAML)

post.summary: POST /api/v1/export — Import whitelabel configuration (JSON or YAML)
POST /api/v1/tts/generate — Generate TTS audio from text

POST /api/v1/chat/completions OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint. Sends a message and returns the AI response synchronously. Body: { messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Hello" }],  // Required — last message is sent transcriptId?: string,  // Optional — reuse existing transcript for context stream?: boolean,       // Reserved for future streaming support (currently ignored) } Response: { id: string, object: "chat.completion", choices: [{ index: 0, message: { role: "assistant", content: "..." }, finish_reason: "stop" }], usage: { prompt_tokens: 0, completion_tokens: 0, total_tokens: 0 }, }
Mount routes
Mount routes
